title: Run Orbit rerun startup
goal: Let Samwise stage a fresh main-based Orbit build attempt, freeze the execution contract, and hand the approved lane contract to the dedicated Orbit rerun execution session.

steps.text: Load the active Orbit execution artifacts plus the explicit handoff artifacts named by the intent parameters, beginning with `Docs/Orbit/Execution/Orbit-Build-Rerun-Checklist.md`, `Docs/Orbit/Execution/Orbit-Product-Acceptance-Checklist.md`, the explicit `rerunPrepPath`, and the explicit `retrospectivePath`.
Summarize the current attempt contract: first-slice scope, required participants, required evidence, required product gates, and the hybrid retrospective closeout rule.

Confirm the approved lane contract from the repo root. If AJ approves live execution during this startup pass, materialize/bootstrap the lane worktree and run baseline validation there; otherwise keep the lane staged and stop before implementation.
Record the active participants for this attempt and the concrete evidence expected from each role before implementation begins.

Hand the approved lane contract, and if already materialized the live lane, to `samwise-orbit-rerun-execution` once startup prerequisites are green, and do not let this startup session stand in for the required multiagent execution loop.

Record the exact attempt-specific product, interaction, validation, participant-evidence, red-pen, evidence-packet, and retrospective artifact paths plus the review gates that the execution session must satisfy before any `review-ready` or `MVP candidate` language is allowed.

Update the rerun-prep artifact with startup state, lane identity, any pinned start point, the required session map, the exact attempt-specific artifact paths, and the execution-handoff/materialization note.
Pause for AJ review if startup prerequisites are not green, the required session routing is missing, or a structural workflow gap is discovered before the live execution handoff.

acceptanceCriteria: The rerun starts from the active Orbit checklist and acceptance docs instead of thread memory alone
Required participants and evidence are explicit before implementation begins
The startup pass hands the approved lane contract to `samwise-orbit-rerun-execution` instead of letting Samwise implement solo inside the staging session
The execution session inherits explicit artifact paths, review gates, and participant expectations
The rerun-prep artifact records startup state, lane identity, any pinned start point, and handoff conditions for the live lane

verification.text: Confirm the current attempt contract names the first slice, active participants, evidence expectations, and required review gates
Confirm the startup pass names `samwise-orbit-rerun-execution` as the live execution surface instead of using the staging session for substantive implementation
Confirm attempt-specific artifact paths and expected session routing are explicit before the first code slice
Confirm the rerun-prep artifact was updated with startup state, lane identity, any pinned start point, and handoff conditions
Confirm retrospective closeout remains owned by `samwise-orbit-rerun-execution` instead of being treated as part of the startup session itself
